overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark trench coat walking along a wet city sidewalk in a historic urban district resembling New Orleans. A vintage black sedan pulls away from the curb and drives past as the character approaches a crosswalk, with ornate stone buildings lining the street under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city sidewalk with street parking

events.description: black vintage sedan accelerates from parked position and begins moving forward
black sedan drives past the character and exits toward the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past storefronts, approaching a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: black vintage sedan accelerating from the curb and driving alongside the sidewalk
woman in green dress walking on the sidewalk holding an umbrella

entered.detail: multi-story historic building with dark stone facade and large windows
elaborate white stone building with arched windows and decorative cornice across the street
tall palm trees lining the distant street center
ornate black metal street lamp with curved design
rectangular concrete planter or trash receptacle on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a historic stone building, with an ornate white building visible across the multi-lane street. A black vintage sedan accelerates from its parked position and drives past on the right, while a pedestrian in a green dress walks ahead on the left. Palm trees line the distant intersection under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection crosswalk in historic district

events.description: black car exits frame, revealing open intersection ahead with crosswalk markings
white vintage sedan drives across the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the crosswalk as the intersection opens up ahead

notable_agents.action: white vintage sedan driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: white zebra crossing stripes marking the pedestrian crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: After the black sedan exits the frame, the view opens toward an intersection with visible crosswalk markings. The character continues walking as the ornate white building on the right draws closer, and a white vintage sedan crosses the intersection from right to left. The historic stone building on the left recedes into the background as the camera approaches the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet urban sidewalk that gradually opens up toward a busy historic intersection. It begins with the character walking beside a weathered stone building while a black vintage sedan accelerates from the curb and drives past on the right. As the sedan exits the frame, the perspective expands to reveal a wide street with crosswalk markings and a pedestrian in a green dress moving ahead. The scene then shifts as the historic stone building recedes into the background and an ornate white building draws closer on the right. Finally, the camera approaches the crossing just as a white vintage sedan glides across the intersection under a heavy, overcast sky.
